/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -g  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/modbus_tty_simulator.dir/modbus_tty_simulator.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_tty_simulator.dir/modbus_s.c.o -o modbus_tty_simulator   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/opt/openssl/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./ -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/opt/openssl/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/dannv/Workspace/SYSTEMS/emqx:clone/emqx-neuron/build-check-cm4 ../libneuron-base.dylib -ldl /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.a -lnng -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lm -lprotobuf-c -lsqlite3 /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libxml2.tbd -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
